zh.Stanstead Montfitchet, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭素可斯坦斯亞德
zh.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet於1150年出生。他於1172年與Millicent de Montfichet在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1195年登記服兵役。他在英國艾可被列為keeper of the royal forest of essex。他去世於1203年享年53歲。

zh-hans.Stanstead Montfitchet, Essex, England: 英国英格兰素可斯坦斯亞德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet于1150年出生。他于1172年与Millicent de Montfichet在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1195年登记服兵役。他在英国艾可被列为keeper of the royal forest of essex。他去世于1203年享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet was born in 1150. He married Millicent de Montfichet in 1172, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1195. His occupation is listed as keeper of the royal forest of essex in Essex, England. He died in 1203, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet est né en 1150. Il a épousé Millicent de Montfichet en 1172, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1195. Sa profession de son indiquée est keeper of the royal forest of essex à Essex, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1203, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet wurde 1150 geboren. Er hat 1172 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Millicent de Montfichet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1195 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als keeper of the royal forest of essex in Essex, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1203 im Alter von 53 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet è nato il nel 1150. Lui sposato Millicent de Montfichet nel 1172, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1195. La sua occupazione è indicata come keeper of the royal forest of essex nel Essex, England. Morì nel 1203, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichetは1150年に生まれた。1172年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでMillicent de Montfichetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1195年に兵役登録をした。イギリスエセックスでの職業はkeeper of the royal forest of essexと記録されている。彼は1203年に53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet(은)는 1150년 태어났다. 그는 1172년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Millicent de Montfichet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1195년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 에세스에서 keeper of the royal forest of essex이었다. 그는 1203년 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet nasceu em 1150. Ele casou-se com Millicent de Montfichet em 1172, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1195. Sua profissão aparece como keeper of the royal forest of essex em Essex, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1203, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet родился в 1150 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Millicent de Montfichet в 1172 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1195 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии keeper of the royal forest of essex в местности эссекс, Англия. Он умер в 1203 г. в возрасте 53 лет.

sm.from 1202 to 1203: mai le 1202 e o'o I le 1203

es.lifeSummary: Richard De Montfichet nació en 1150. Se casó con Millicent de Montfichet en 1172, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1195. Su ocupación registrada era keeper of the royal forest of essex en Essex, Inglaterra. Murió en 1203, a la edad de 53 años.
